title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Landmark Group India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Landmark Group India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
